rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY D. MURPHY VS. MICHAEL YAKOVLEVICH KLESTOFF et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtc Of Mtn And Mtn To Strike And/Or Tax Deft Daetwyler Memo Of Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 28, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF TIMOTHY MURPHY's Motion To Strike And/Or Tax Defendant Daetwyler's Memo Of Costs Continued to May 16, 2014 be heard in Department 302 at 9:30 a.m. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and 2.6C and provide courtesy copies of moving papers, reply and Memorandum of Costs to department 302 no later than April 30, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date or the motion will be denied. All exhibits must be separated by exhibit tabs. CRC 3.1110(f). = (501/REQ)
